name: IRC_CMT_LAUNCHES
description: This table stores Message Launch request Information.

columns.Name: LAUNCH_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: PARENT_LAUNCH_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_CMT_LAUNCHES table. Stores the LAUNCH_ID of the parent asset.

columns.Name: LAUNCH_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the type of message launch. Stores the type as a lookup code.

columns.Name: SUBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores primary key of the launch type requesting message launch.

columns.Name: SUBJECT_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores primary key (String) of the launch type requesting message launch.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores scheduled date for the launch.

columns.Name: SEND_BY_DATE
columns.Comments: Maximum send date for the launch.

columns.Name: LAUNCH_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores status of the launch. Stores launch status as a lookup code.

columns.Name: LAUNCH_START_TS
columns.Comments: Stores launch processing start time.

columns.Name: LAUNCH_COMPLETE_TS
columns.Comments: Stores launch processing completion time.

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_COUNT
columns.Comments: Aggregate column. Stores total recipients targeted.

columns.Name: UNSENT_COUNT
columns.Comments: Aggregate column. Stores total number of messages which did not get sent.

columns.Name: PENDING_COUNT
columns.Comments: Aggregate column. Stores total number of messages which are due to be sent.

columns.Name: BOUNCE_COUNT
columns.Comments: Aggregate column. Stores the total count of bounced messages.

columns.Name: OPEN_COUNT
columns.Comments: Aggregate column. Stores the total count of Opened messages.

columns.Name: ERROR_REASON
columns.Comments: Stores the reason for error status of the launch.

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ESS Job Request ID

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
